      "それはスパルタを支援するペルシャ帝国の介入を特徴としています。",
      "それはニキアスの平和を特徴としています。",
      "それはシチリア遠征を特徴としています。",
      "それはデケレイア戦争またはイオニア戦争を特徴としています。",
      "それはアイゴスポタモイの決定的な戦いを特徴としています。",
      "それは民主主義からスパルタ式の寡頭制への置き換えを特徴としています。",
      "それは広範な貧困を特徴としています。",
      "それは古代ギリシャの戦争が総力戦へと変貌したことを特徴としています。",
      "それは大量虐殺、宗教的・文化的タブーの破壊、広大な田園地帯の荒廃、都市全体の破壊を特徴としています。"

    ],

      "それはアテネがほぼ完全な隷属状態にまで縮小されることに影響を与えました。",
      "それはギリシャ全土で感じられた経済的コストに影響を与えました。",
      "それは古代ギリシャの戦争が総力戦へと変貌することに影響を与えました。"

About: It is about hegemony over Ancient Greece.
Affects: It affects the ancient Greek world.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Athenian-led Delian League.
It is associated with the Spartan-led Peloponnesian League.
It is associated with the intervention of the Persian Empire.
CausedBy: It is caused by the growth of the power of Athens and the alarm this inspired in Lacedaemon.
ConsistsOf: It consists of four related conflicts.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by four related conflicts.
It is characterized by the intervention of the Persian Empire in support of Sparta.
It is characterized by the Peace of Nicias.
It is characterized by the Sicilian Expedition.
It is characterized by the Decelean War or Ionian War.
It is characterized by the decisive battle of Aegospotamos.
It is characterized by the replacement of democracies with Spartan-style oligarchies.
It is characterized by widespread poverty.
It is characterized by the transformation of ancient Greek warfare into total war.
It is characterized by mass atrocities, shattering religious and cultural taboos, devastating vast swathes of countryside, and destroying whole cities.
Influenced: It influenced the ancient Greek world.
It influenced the establishment of Sparta as the leading power of Greece.
It influenced the reduction of Athens to a state of near-complete subjection.
It influenced the economic costs felt all across Greece.
It influenced the transformation of ancient Greek warfare into total war.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the growth of the power of Athens.
It was influenced by the alarm inspired in Lacedaemon.
It was influenced by the Pentecontaetia.
KnownAs: It is known as the Ten Years' War.
It is known as the Archidamian War.
It is known as the Argive War.
It is known as the Sicilian Expedition.
It is known as the Decelean War.
It is known as the Ionian War.
KnownFor: It is known for hegemony over Ancient Greece.
It is known for the intervention of the Persian Empire in support of Sparta.
It is known for the Peace of Nicias.
It is known for the Sicilian Expedition.
It is known for the decisive battle of Aegospotamos.
It is known for the replacement of democracies with Spartan-style oligarchies.
It is known for the transformation of ancient Greek warfare into total war.
LocatedIn: It is located in the Eastern Mediterranean.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Eastern Mediterranean.
OccurredOn: It occurred on 431 BC.
It occurred on 425 BC.
It occurred on 424 BC.
It occurred on 421 BC.
It occurred on 419 BC.
It occurred on 416 BC.
It occurred on 418 BC.
It occurred on 415 BC.
It occurred on 413 BC.
It occurred on 405 BC.
It occurred on 404 BC.
